work.label: work
work.description: Production-grade backend engineering in banking and payments, focused on reliability, security, and transaction integrity at scale.

items.title: Java Developer — Mindgate Solutions
items.intro: Software engineer building high-volume banking workflows and transaction-heavy payment systems under strict production and audit constraints.
items.details:
Design and maintain backend services for transaction processing, validation, and bulk corporate payment flows.
- Build services that prioritize correctness, traceability, and deterministic failure handling.
- Improve resiliency and operational safety for critical banking workflows running in production.
- Support reconciliation, auditability, and data consistency across payment processing paths.
- Work with Java, Spring Boot, microservices, OracleDB, and PostgreSQL in a regulated environment.
items.note: Day-to-day engineering is shaped by idempotency, reconciliation, audit trails, production safety, and low-risk change management.

projects.label: projects
projects.description: Selected engineering systems spanning secure banking platforms, web builds, tooling, and applied prototypes.

items.title: WiFi Trolley Bot — ESP32
items.intro: ESP32-based trolley bot with wireless control, lightweight firmware, and real-time device coordination.
items.details:
Built an embedded control project around ESP32-based wireless command handling and motor control.
- Implemented WiFi-driven command flow for responsive remote operation.
- Integrated control logic with hardware behavior and navigation routines.
- Kept the firmware structure lightweight and practical for iteration on embedded hardware.
items.note: Hands-on embedded project emphasizing control logic and reliable WiFi command handling.

items.title: Conference Site
items.intro: Conference website for SASTRA ICMAT with a clear submission flow and structured event communication.
items.details:
Built an information-focused conference website designed to reduce friction for attendees and paper submitters.
- Structured submission guidance, calls for papers, and deadline-related content for clarity.
- Organized schedule and speaker information into a clean, accessible layout.
- Delivered a responsive UI that keeps important event information easy to scan.
items.note: Designed to minimize confusion around submission requirements and keep deadlines and tracks easy to find.

items.title: Theta2k23 — Event Web Presence
items.intro: Event website for SASTRA Theta2k23 focused on speed, navigation, and mobile-first access to updates.
items.details:
Created a compact event site optimized for attendees who need fast access to schedules, event lists, and announcements.
- Prioritized mobile-first navigation and short interaction paths.
- Organized event-centric content so updates remain easy to find under time pressure.
- Kept the interface lightweight and focused on clarity over decoration.
items.note: Prioritizes speed and clarity for event attendees on mobile.

items.title: Hell Pine — VS Code Theme Extension
items.intro: Custom VS Code theme tuned for contrast, readability, and long-form daily development work.
items.details:
Forked Rosé Pine and evolved it into a higher-contrast theme aimed at real developer workflow comfort.
- Tuned token colors for readability across common coding contexts.
- Packaged and published the extension for repeatable installation and maintenance.
- Preserved the original theme character while improving visual clarity for daily use.
items.note: Theme focuses on readability and personalized color balance without losing the Rosé Pine character.

items.title: TheGlobe — Freelance Web Build
items.intro: Freelance website for a digital marketing organization with business-first messaging and clean presentation.
items.details:
Delivered a client-facing marketing website built around trust, service clarity, and maintainable presentation.
- Structured content around business goals and service discoverability.
- Focused on responsive behavior, visual consistency, and clean component composition.
- Shipped a practical handoff-ready build suitable for client ownership.
items.note: Focused on clarity, credibility, and a solid handoff for client ownership.

items.title: Neovim Configuration — nvim
items.intro: Personal Neovim setup optimized for fast editing, consistent tooling, and maintainable configuration.
items.details:
Built and maintained a modular Neovim configuration to improve daily engineering workflow.
- Organized the setup into modular Lua-based configuration units.
- Integrated LSP, formatting, and workflow shortcuts for faster feedback loops.
- Kept startup speed and maintainability as first-order priorities.
items.note: Config-first productivity project with an emphasis on speed and maintainability.

research.label: research
research.description: Academic research in cybersecurity and applied machine learning, centered on intrusion detection models and IIoT datasets.

items.title: HGCNN–LSTM Intrusion Detection
items.intro: Hybrid deep-learning intrusion detection system for cyber-physical networks.
items.details:
Hybrid IDS model combining Hierarchical Gated CNN (HGCNN) for spatial feature extraction and LSTM for temporal sequence modeling.

Key Contributions:
- HGCNN + LSTM end-to-end pipeline
- Multi-class CPS attack detection
- Evaluation on IIoT benchmark data
- Clear ablation and error analysis
items.note: Notebook-driven experiments detailing preprocessing, feature engineering, and model training with reproducible metrics.

items.title: Intrusion Detection System (IIoT) — Hybrid CNN + LSTM
items.intro: Deep-learning IDS for IIoT networks using a hybrid CNN + LSTM approach.
items.details:
Hybrid CNN + LSTM IDS designed to detect malicious IIoT traffic with improved accuracy on benchmark data.

Highlights:
- UNSW-NB15 benchmark dataset
- CNN for attack event detection
- LSTM for temporal sequence modeling
- Focus on lowering misclassification and false alarms
items.note: Notebook-driven workflow with clear dataset preprocessing, model training, and evaluation steps.

items.title: HGCNN-LSTM — Cyber Attack Detection in Cyber-Physical Systems
items.intro: Data-driven intrusion detection research using HGCNN + LSTM for CPS environments.
items.details:
Research implementation focused on cyber-physical system security.

Highlights:
- HGCNN + LSTM architecture
- Sequence modeling for CPS data
- Multi-class detection focus
- Reproducible notebook workflow
items.note: Detailed model notebook includes preprocessing, training curves, and confusion-matrix evaluation.

items.title: HyperCoar-DAM — Robust IDS for IIoT Networks
items.intro: Robust intrusion detection approach focused on IIoT network protection.
items.details:
Research prototype targeting robust IDS performance in IIoT.

Highlights:
- Robust detection objective
- Focus on IIoT threat resilience
- Notebook-based workflow
- Reproducible experimentation
items.note: Research artifact documents robustness-focused training and evaluation within Jupyter notebooks.

items.title: Genetic Programming Approach for Advanced Persistent Threat Detection
items.intro: Tree-based genetic programming approach for APT detection on highly imbalanced cyber-attack data.
items.details:
Research project targeting APT detection using a tree-based genetic programming algorithm trained on highly imbalanced data (99:1).

Highlights:
- Genetic programming classifier (tree-based)
- Handles extreme class imbalance (99:1)
- Python-based experimentation pipeline
- Reproducible training and evaluation workflow
items.note: Focuses on imbalance-aware training and GP-driven model evolution for minority attack detection.

education.label: education
education.description: Formal academic background with a focus on systems, software engineering, and ML fundamentals.

items.title: B.Tech Computer Science — SASTRA
items.intro: Computer Science degree with emphasis on systems fundamentals, software engineering, and applied research.
items.details:
Built a strong academic base across systems and software engineering with parallel exposure to applied ML research.
- Studied operating systems, DBMS, computer networks, and data structures.
- Worked on research-led projects in cybersecurity and machine learning.
- Combined coursework with practical technical leadership and project execution.
items.note: Academics emphasize systems foundations and practical engineering practice with research exposure.
